name: db_only_phase_wave0_backlog_truth_and_dispatch_foundation
outcome_goal: Backlog truth, dispatch recovery, bootstrap parity, and dirty-file collision guard are DB-owned and runnable without markdown roadmap mirrors.
anti_requirements: Do not leave backlog hygiene in chat-only memory.
Do not parallelize jobs that write dirty core workflow or routing files until collision guard runs.

jobs.label: collision_guard
jobs.prompt: Refresh `artifacts/workflow/db_only_phase/COLLISION_GUARD.md` from the live dirty worktree. Record which files must remain non-parallel for the next waves, and make ownership explicit for any packet that touches `registry/agent_config.py`, `runtime/task_type_router.py`, `runtime/workflow/unified.py`, `scripts/workflow.sh`, or `scripts/test.sh`. Do not fix runtime behavior in this packet; only sharpen the guard surface.

jobs.label: stale_bug_audit_and_close
jobs.prompt: Audit the legacy unwired-surface bugs against the actual repo and DB state. Keep `BUG-661DC83D`, `BUG-0388B701`, `BUG-718C3494`, `BUG-965E983B`, and `BUG-D0DC2D32` open unless live evidence disproves them. Treat `BUG-CDB5894B`, `BUG-D3DE8841`, `BUG-D76B1EA9`, `BUG-C487AEB4`, and `BUG-C1A2FB09` as stale-open or verification-only closure candidates if the current repo still proves that call. Update `artifacts/workflow/db_only_phase/db_only_phase_writeback.sql` with explicit resolution summaries; do not widen into runtime fixes.

jobs.label: noise_bug_bulk_close
jobs.prompt: Refine the Wave 0 backlog-hygiene SQL so synthetic placeholders, repeated dispatch-failure clones, MCP test artifacts, and opaque `a_*/b_*` runtime stubs are bulk-closed with one durable resolution summary. Exclude still-actionable architectural bugs, especially `BUG-6D64923C`. Keep the logic rerunnable and deterministic.

jobs.label: dispatch_truth_repair
jobs.prompt: Finish the async dispatch truth contract for `BUG-6D64923C`. Keep submit/status durable and async-only, keep wait unsupported when it would cross tool-call boundaries, and make stuck or idle run recovery explicit instead of stranding orchestrations. Work only in the unified dispatch and MCP/integration surfaces needed for submit and status truth.

jobs.label: bootstrap_surface_parity
jobs.prompt: Align repo-local workflow and test front doors with the actually supported DB-only surfaces. Fix stale `artifacts/dispatch/...` references in the authority-cleanup pack so they point to `artifacts/workflow/...`, keep `scripts/workflow.sh` and `scripts/test.sh` as the repo front doors, and do not reintroduce markdown roadmap gating.
